commit_message: refactor(tests): refactor tests structure refactor(tests): refactor tests structure This PR adds a couple assert helper functions (`assert_eq` and `assert_true`) to simplify the tests and improve formatting of errors, and to convert integers to `std_logic_vector`s of different sizes. It also removes the start/end test reports and adds the name of the module being tested in the `[SIMULATION]` header to remove noise
